parent.text: Many talk about how to train their models. Few mention how to clean their data.
parent.name: Yun-Ta Tsai
parent.embed_html:
Many talk about how to train their models. Few mention how to clean their data.

— Yun-Ta Tsai (@yunta_tsai) April 30, 2026

ai_summary: The thread discusses a critical but often overlooked aspect of AI/ML development: data cleaning and preparation. Yunta Tsai points out that while model training receives significant attention, the foundational work of data quality is underemphasized, and Elon validates this as a major operational challenge. This insight applies directly to xAI's Grok development and broader AI infrastructure at Tesla and other Musk ventures, where data quality is foundational to model performance and real-world application success.
embed_html:
Yeah, it’s a big deal

— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) May 1, 2026
